[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Backtesting page — strategy engine, reactive UI, indicator panels, and button unification
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1060
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1061

  Details:
  Built a full-featured backtesting page for companies: client-side strategy engine with sell-off correction overlay and stacked indicator panels (sell-off barometer, RSI, MACD). Reactive controls — ticker autocomplete, strategy dropdown, single date-range picker. Clean-data endpoint via GET /backtest/data. Unified the Analyze and Backtest buttons into a single Analyze button on company pages. Documentation and execution roadmap for the /compare→backtester repurpose.
